topic: My staircase has fourteen steps but some nights there is a fifteenth
title: My Staircase Has Fourteen Steps. Some Nights There Are Fifteen. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My staircase has fourteen steps. Some nights, in the dark, I count fifteen.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot looking up a dim wooden residential staircase from the bottom, the steps rising to a dark landing, single dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two story house. Lived here twelve years. I know these stairs.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a two story house interior entry with a carpeted staircase, warm dim lamp light, framed pictures on the wall, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Fourteen up to bed. Every night.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of worn wooden stair treads receding upward into shadow, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night my foot found another step where the landing should be.
scenes.image_prompt: close low shot of a bare foot on a dark wooden stair tread in near darkness, faint light from above, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a staircase in near total darkness with only the faint outline of steps visible, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I counted down. Fifteen. I turned on the light. Fourteen.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot up a lit staircase with all steps clearly visible, warm overhead light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand resting on a wooden stair banister in dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: In the dark, always fifteen. In the light, fourteen.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a staircase half in shadow and half in light, the steps ambiguous in the dark portion, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The extra step is near the top. Cold. It does not creak like the others.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single worn stair tread near the top of a staircase, dim cold light, a pale tone to the wood, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night, on the fifteenth step, something stepped down past me in the dark.
scenes.image_prompt: wide dim shot of a staircase at night with a faint dark shape descending, motion blur, only a silhouette, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I leave the stair light on now. Always.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small stair light fixture glowing on a wall beside a staircase at night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The bulb keeps burning out. Only that one. Only at night.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a burnt out light bulb in a stairwell fixture, the staircase dark below, faint moonlight, vertical 9:16 framing
